{{Infobox character
| name = Fox
| aliases = The Fox
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Fox|the Fox]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Zakariel]], also known as the Fox, is a five-tailed entity who possesses ancient knowledge regarding [[Monarchs]] and has access to a repository of historical truths and [[Soulsmithing]] expertise. Characterized as highly selfish and competitive with [[the Angler of the Crystal Halls]], she often prioritizes personal gain, such as looting valuables during assaults. Despite her self-serving nature, she is capable of performing critical tasks, such as breaching cordons and acting as a swift hunter for specific purposes. Physically, she is capable of great speed and has been observed interacting with various individuals including [[Lindon]] and [[Razael]]. Beyond the individual, the term Fox refers to a specific division of practitioners who manipulate the [[Way]] to create portals and facilitate travel between [[Iterations]]. This group is known for their ability to bind the [[Way]] to specific destinations, acting as couriers through tunnels in reality. Additionally, there are various combat and utility techniques associated with the Fox name, such as the [[Path of the White Fox]]. These include the [[Fox Mirror]] for invisibility and illusions, the [[Foxtail]] technique to blur movement, the [[Fox Dream]] for mental manipulation or defensive smoke shields, and the use of [[White Fox]] [[madra]] to create decoys.}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Zakariel]] is also known as the [[Fox]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Fox]] is the only one capable of breaching the cordon around Fathom and returning to [[Haven]] without being caught.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] moves with the speed of the [[Fox]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A portal was opened by the [[Fox]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Traveling]] between [[Iterations]] requires high skill as a [[Fox]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
